title: Backend Developer Vacancy at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at OLX India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About OLX India Asia Pacific Associates:
OLX India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India Asia Pacific Associates!
